# Hannah Clarke

> Design Systems & Frontend Platform Engineer based in Manchester, UK. Specialises in
> design-system build/release engineering, testing infrastructure, developer experience,
> and AI tooling (agents, MCP, AI coding guardrails). Currently UI Engineer on the design
> system at Intapp.

This file helps language models find the most relevant, machine-readable information.
The résumé in Markdown is the canonical, LLM-friendly source of truth.
